## How to test

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows `Brain_API_Specification.yaml` for any endpoint shape changes
- [ ] Follows `Brain_Engineering_Standards.md` for auth / errors / idempotency / observability
- [ ] No secrets in code, config, or commits (§11.3)
- [ ] Labeled `ai-assisted` if written with AI assistance (§12.4)
